title: Fresh & Stuff
description: This mod pack is a fan-made version of Actions & Stuff. This mod package is Beautiful resource packages from each other in the mod package, 3d items and more, and excellent player animations. Enjoy
body:
Fresh & Stuff Modpack is designed to give players the most pleasant graphics. Player animations,3d materials,animals,blocks and shaders. We are recreating minecraft for our friends who are tired of playing Minecraft.This modpack is fan-made, none of the mod and source packages are mine.                                      

Those who have problems with the Modpack can come to our Discord.
This Modpack is in the testing phase.
